business.name: CLEAN MAGIC TX, LLC.
business.tagline: Reliable Handyman Services in Irving, TX

seo.title: Handyman Services Irving, TX | CLEAN MAGIC TX, LLC.
seo.description: Trusted handyman in Irving, TX. Expert repairs, installations, and home maintenance. Call (832) 814-6813 for fast, reliable service.

hero.headline: Your Home, Perfectly Maintained
hero.subheadline: From minor repairs to major renovations, we deliver quality craftsmanship with a smile. Same-day service available in Irving.

featureSections.title: Fix It Right the First Time
featureSections.body: Whether it's a leaky faucet, a squeaky door, or drywall damage, our skilled handymen handle it all. We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.
featureSections.cardBody: Need a quick fix? We offer same-day service for urgent repairs. Call us and we'll be there promptly.

featureSections.title: Upgrade Your Space
featureSections.body: Transform your home with custom installations and upgrades. From smart home devices to new light fixtures, we bring your vision to life with precision and care.
featureSections.cardBody: Not sure what you need? We'll come by, assess the job, and provide a clear, upfront quote with no hidden fees.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We take responsibility for every job, big or small.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No surprises. We provide detailed estimates before any work begins, and we stick to them.

whyChooseUs.title: Skilled Craftsmen
whyChooseUs.description: Our team has years of hands-on experience across all trades. We take pride in doing the job right.

whyChooseUs.title: Local & Reliable
whyChooseUs.description: Proudly serving Irving and surrounding areas. We show up on time and communicate every step.

testimonials.quote: Clean Magic TX fixed my kitchen sink and installed a new garbage disposal. Fast, professional, and the price was fair. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: They assembled my patio furniture and mounted my TV. Everything was perfect. Great attention to detail.
testimonials.author: James L.

testimonials.quote: I've used them multiple times for various repairs. Always on time, friendly, and the work is top-notch.
testimonials.author: Maria G.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call or click to schedule your service today. We'll make your home feel like new.

servicesPage.intro: From small fixes to big projects, our handyman services cover it all. We bring skill, reliability, and a friendly attitude to every job in Irving.

services.title: General Repairs & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Fix leaks, patch walls, and keep your home running smoothly.
services.longDescription: Our general repair service tackles the everyday wear and tear of your home. We handle plumbing drips, electrical glitches, drywall holes, and more. Every repair is done with quality materials and a focus on long-term durability.
benefits: Extends the life of your home's systems
Prevents small issues from becoming costly

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess the issue and identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We perform the fix using proper tools and techniques.

process.title: Cleanup
process.description: We leave your space clean and tidy after the job.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, for many common issues. Call us to check availability.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Irving and nearby Dallas-Fort Worth suburbs.

services.title: Furniture Assembly & Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional assembly for flat-pack furniture and more.
services.longDescription: Save yourself the frustration of confusing instructions. We assemble and install furniture from IKEA, Wayfair, Amazon, and other retailers. We also mount TVs, shelves, and curtain rods with precision and care.
benefits: No missing parts or stripped screws
TVs mounted securely on any wall
Time saved for you to enjoy your space

process.title: Unbox & Organize
process.description: We lay out all parts and hardware.

process.title: Assemble
process.description: We follow instructions carefully and build your item.

process.title: Place & Level
process.description: We position your furniture and ensure everything is level.

faqs.question: Do you bring your own tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, we come fully equipped with all necessary tools.

faqs.question: Can you mount a TV over a fireplace?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle all types of wall mounts.

services.title: Plumbing & Electrical
services.shortDescription: Fix leaks, install fixtures, and handle basic wiring.
services.longDescription: Our handymen are experienced in common plumbing and electrical tasks. We replace faucets, toilets, garbage disposals, light fixtures, outlets, and switches. For complex work, we coordinate with licensed specialists.
benefits: Quick resolution of leaks and clogs
Peace of mind with proper work

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We identify the problem and explain options.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: We fix or install the component efficiently.

process.title: Test
process.description: We test everything to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: Can you install a new light fixture?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install chandeliers, pendants, flush mounts, and more.

faqs.question: Do you handle gas line repairs?
faqs.answer: No, gas work requires a specialized plumber. We can refer you.

services.title: Painting & Drywall
services.shortDescription: Refresh your walls with expert painting and drywall repair.
services.longDescription: Give your home a fresh look with our painting and drywall services. We patch holes, repair cracks, and apply smooth, even coats of paint. Interior and exterior work available. We use premium paints for lasting beauty.
benefits: Flawless finish with no drips or streaks
Increases home value and curb appeal
Protects walls from moisture and wear

process.title: Prep
process.description: We protect floors and furniture, then patch and sand.

process.title: Prime & Paint
process.description: We apply primer and two coats of quality paint.

process.title: Cleanup
process.description: We remove tape and covers, leaving your room spotless.

faqs.question: Do you provide paint?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can supply paint or work with your chosen colors.

faqs.question: Can you paint a single accent wall?
faqs.answer: Of course. We handle projects of any size.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Handyman
about.mission: To provide Irving homeowners with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make home maintenance stress-free.
story: Clean Magic TX, LLC. was founded on the belief that every home deserves care and attention. Starting with a small toolkit and a commitment to excellence, we built a reputation for honesty, skill, and punctuality. Over the years, we've helped hundreds of Irving residents with everything from leaky faucets to full home renovations.

Today, we continue to grow by staying true to our roots: showing up on time, communicating clearly, and delivering work that we're proud to put our name on. Whether it's a small repair or a major project, we treat every home like our own.

coreValues.title: Quality Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every job is done to the highest standard.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and respect for your home.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up when we say we will and finish on time.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our success. We listen and adapt to your needs.

contact.headline: Let's Get Started
contact.subheadline: Call or fill out the form to schedule your service. We'll respond within 24 hours.
